query:
SELECT 
            c.id::text as "id!", 
            c.nombre, 
            g.color as "color", 
            c.activo 
           FROM categorias c
           LEFT JOIN grupos g ON c.grupo_id = g.id
           WHERE c.tipo_operacion_id = 'INGRESO'::tipo_operacion_enum 
           ORDER BY c.orden ASC, c.nombre ASC
